metadata.description: Family template definitions for ICD-10-CM compositional analysis

anatomy_adjective_x_condition.description: Anatomical adjective + condition (e.g., nasopharyngeal diphtheria, cutaneous listeriosis)
anatomy_adjective_x_condition.rationale: Common in 2-word unmatched terms (27.4% of unmatched)

condition_x_condition_high.description: Specific condition + general condition category (e.g., arthritis gonococcal)
